issues.sample: When the car was put in Reverse Gear, the car was still moving forward and not moving backwards. I tried it multiple times, but it was still moving forward.   There was a car in front of my car and since the car was expected to go backwards,  this issue put the safety at risk as

I have a Cadillac 2023 XT6  When I put the car in reverse in the daytime the Back up camera display works fine. If it is at night,Raining, or during any hours of the day like in a garage the display dims .It is hard to see a person behind you or any poles. When shifting into Reve

The rear camera is not working properly. Rear camera is necessary for the driver to help prevent hitting unseen subject behind the car. Let say if there is a 2 years old kid playing in the back of my car, I wouldn't see the kid.    I brought the car to the dealership for the 3rd

i WAS INFORMED DURING A DEALER OIL CHANGE THAT THE TOE LINKS ON THE REAR WHEELS NEEDED TO BE REPLACED.  WHY IS THIS NOT COVERED UNDER THE BUMPER TO BUMPER WARRANTY?

narrative.headline: What 2023 Cadillac Xt6 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 13 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (31% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
